channel.title: Bugs on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Bugs on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Why Troika Games Were So Buggy
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why Troika games were so buggy.

item.title: Bugs In RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about bugs and particularly bugs and RPGs.

item.title: When Bugs Become Features
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to answer another question, this time from bite your own teeth, 2100.
